scope_boundary: Sixteen model-generated plan/code runs provide bounded local comparative evidence for authority, effect observation, receipt/path reconciliation, residuals, rollback, quarantine, and measured cost, while zero governed releases and two failed rollbacks block broader promotion.
transition_reason: Sixteen model-generated plan/code runs provide bounded local comparative evidence for authority, effect observation, receipt/path reconciliation, residuals, rollback, quarantine, and measured cost, while zero governed releases and two failed rollbacks block broader promotion.
required_artifacts: deployed or externally reviewable governed-work traces
production cost, throughput, rollback, and residual evidence
negative_results: governed route released zero useful candidates
two governed rollbacks remained inexact and quarantined
four governed residuals were discovered and two remained open
the prevalidation pilot was preserved as non-evidentiary after protocol defects
downgrade_triggers: raw artifact or checkpoint digest mismatch
core support promoted without a separate accepted upward transition
bounded local result described as production or open-world evidence
promotion_burden: deployed or externally reviewable governed-work traces; broader natural workloads and models; independent verifier-quality assessment; production cost, throughput, rollback, and residual evidence
limitations: no deployed authorization, sandbox, verifier, rollback, or release service
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; no external human review requested or claimed
acceptance_blockers: deployed or externally reviewable governed-work traces
production cost, throughput, rollback, and residual evidence
non_claims: does not promote any affected chapter-core claim above argument
does not establish production transfer, external independence, open-world safety, or ASI capability
